minimum_success: at least one nontrivial held-out book exact without full atlas correction
or reduction of combined chunk/source/literal external ledger after paid corrections
next_gate.name: joint_chunk_origin_beam_pilot
next_gate.purpose: construct a beam over chunk-origin hypotheses instead of field tapes

requirements.failure_condition: if exact chunks must be declared or payload signatures are used, route collapses to rejected dictionary/signature accounts
requirements.testable_gate: prefix/family holdout must keep true chunk stream in beam above same-length/chunk-shuffled controls

requirements.failure_condition: if source policy still needs future target text outside the generated chunk candidate, source remains external
requirements.testable_gate: given generated chunk candidates, earliest-source collapse should reduce source tape with paid exceptions

requirements.failure_condition: if literal tape remains a separate payload declaration, representation has not changed enough
requirements.testable_gate: literal/copy chunk candidates must share one innovation process and improve over separate literal payload + composition/source tapes

requirements.failure_condition: if corrections exceed direct external tape declaration, it is only a predictive clue
requirements.testable_gate: controller must reduce executable ledger after model, beam-rank, and correction costs

requirements.failure_condition: if gains vanish under controls, classify as parser/compressor artifact
requirements.testable_gate: prefix holdout, public-bookcase family holdout, same-multiset chunk shuffle, same-length random chunks, and permuted train controls

route_rows.evidence: unique chunks 256/261; copy unique 207/208; dictionary delta 32442.167 bits
route_rows.reason: mostly declares target payload rather than generating chunks

route_rows.evidence: best non-payload family kind_x_book_mod10_x_length_bucket has 85 signatures and 22 singleton rows; payload signatures rely on target digits
route_rows.reason: non-payload signatures leave exact chunks unresolved; payload signatures are target-text oracles

route_rows.evidence: roundtrip True; promoted executable reductions 0; rejected routes 3
route_rows.reason: valid ledger but no tape reducer promotes inside decoder

route_rows.evidence: source choice collapses after target chunk is granted, but target chunk remains the missing generator
route_rows.reason: useful lower bound for a future joint program, not decoder-visible

route_rows.evidence: prior source-boundary alignment found no single-prior-chunk copy explanation and source starts/end rarely align to op boundaries
route_rows.reason: operation chunks are not reused as simple block units
